data.content: 1. Acceptance requires click-driven UI behavior: clicking the version pill must trigger the update check and surface the resulting message/action. 2. The implementation appears to render those states in src/components/version-badge.tsx, but the new tests in src/components/__tests__/version-badge.test.ts exercise only checkForUpdates() and never render VersionBadge or simulate clicking the pill. 3. Because the review step requires verifying tests cover the required behavior, add component-level coverage that proves the click starts the check and that the UI shows either 'Update now to v{version}' or 'Latest version installed' based on the response.
